mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_password_reset_code (email, code, expires_at, used, created_time) VALUES (#{email}, #{code}, #{expiresAt}, #{used}, #{createdTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_password_reset_code WHERE email = #{email} AND used = 0 AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_password_reset_code SET used = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_password_reset_code WHERE expires_at < NOW()
